deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERRO: DATABASE_URL ausente" >&2; exit 1; fi; npx prisma migrate deploy || exit 1; case "$SKIP_DB_SEED" in 1|true|TRUE|yes|YES) echo "[bootstrap] SKIP_DB_SEED ativo — prisma db seed omitido.";; *) echo "[bootstrap] Executando prisma db seed"; npx prisma db seed || exit 1;; esac; exec node dist/main.js'
